fixture.notes: TypeDuck Web alpha fixture and local source are the Phase 5 UI authority.

deployFailureEvidence.notes: Plan 05-03 guard covers save-before-side-effect failure semantics; VM evidence must confirm user-facing Apply behavior.

identity.notes: Plan 05-05 and 05-08 guards cover TypeDuck Windows IME identity, version, TypeDuck-HK librime, lookup-filter, and schema attribution; VM evidence must capture the visible dialog.

aboutVersionSource.notes: TypeDuckSettingsVersion.h is generated from the same CMake version source.

engineSchemaAttribution.notes: About text includes TypeDuck-HK librime fork v1.1.3, rime-dictionary-lookup-filter commit 3671814d4e4aeab8d616ceea3c7f6d88e96bba02, and TypeDuck-HK schema aap2-alpha b5ab44e187d010fa13c71bd320c07259b224ae5b.

iconAssignments.notes: Strict icon packaging guard verified PE icon payloads and installer icon assignment.

legacyMoqiAssetScan.notes: Strict icon packaging guard verified moqi.png, mo.ico, mo.png, and moqi.ico are absent from staged Phase 5 package surfaces.

candidateBaseline.notes: Preview harness sample nei baseline candidate and dictionary layout.

candidateMultilingual.notes: Preview harness multilingual Indonesian-main candidate rows.

dictionaryDetail.notes: Preview harness multilingual dictionary side panel evidence.

compoundHousam.notes: Preview harness housam compound detail evidence.

reverseLookupCangjie.notes: Preview harness Cangjie reverse lookup sample.

settingsTwoColumn.notes: Local staged TypeDuckSettings.exe settings window capture.

aboutDialog.notes: Local source/package guards prove About content; visible About dialog capture is deferred to VM evidence because local window automation did not open the modal reliably.

installerFirstRunSettings.notes: Installer was run inside the VM active user session via /VERYSILENT for safety; source/package guards verify the postinstall run entry, but visible installer-first-run settings UI was not captured because skipifsilent suppresses the run entry.

postInstallSettingsEntryPoint.notes: Active VM user route launched installed TypeDuckSettings.exe from C:\Program Files (x86)\TypeDuckIME; screenshot shows Display Languages first and two-column settings layout.

settingsPersistenceAfterRestart.notes: Apply in active VM session showed bilingual Settings saved status and created C:\Users\User\AppData\Local\TypeDuckIME\TypeDuckPreferences.json. Restart persistence was not exercised.

aboutDialog.notes: Source/package guards verify About text/assets/links/version/attribution, but active VM attempts to open the About modal by control message, keyboard, and mouse click did not produce a visible About dialog capture.

notepadCandidateNei.notes: Active VM user default input method override was set to the TypeDuck zh-HK TIP; Notepad typing nei showed the TypeDuck candidate popup with Cantonese candidates.

browserCandidateHousam.notes: A controlled housam candidate capture was taken in Notepad, but browser host-app evidence was not captured.

movementReveal.notes: Pointer movement over live Notepad candidates for nei and housam did not reveal a side dictionary detail panel in captured VM screenshots.

stationaryPointerNoFlicker.notes: Stationary pointer capture remained stable with the candidate list visible; this is partial no-flicker evidence but does not prove dictionary detail reveal.

highDpiPlacement.notes: High-DPI live VM placement was not exercised; preview-only high-DPI screenshot exists but is not final VM evidence.

multiMonitorPlacement.notes: Multi-monitor or equivalent extended-desktop live VM placement was not exercised.

uiLessHost.notes: UI-less TSF host path was not exercised in the active VM session.

imperfectCompositionRectangle.notes: Imperfect composition-rectangle fallback was not exercised in the active VM session.

inputPickerAndExecutableIcons.notes: Icon package guard passed, but visible VM input picker/executable icon evidence was not captured.

privacy.notes: Evidence must avoid personal typed content; use controlled samples nei and housam only.
